page_builder.title: Page Builder
page_builder.subtitle: Fly runtime, compatibility, and provider control surface.
page_builder.editorSubtitle: Full Fly authoring surface. Persistence remains owned by the consumer module facade.

unbound.title: No consumer document selected
unbound.body: Open a consumer-owned document to start full visual authoring. Page Builder does not own document persistence.

status.dragging: Choose a drop position in the canvas

ssrInspector.title: Classic SSR inspector
ssrInspector.description: These forms submit directly to the consumer-owned Fly intent endpoint. No hydration or WASM is required.
ssrInspector.runtimeContextHelp: The context is stored in the server draft only. It is not written into the canonical page project.
ssrInspector.localeHelp: Localized runtime values resolve using the active locale, then the fallback chain. Locale settings are stored only in the server draft.
ssrInspector.removeProperty: Remove this property instead of setting it

localePolicy.title: Project locale policy
localePolicy.description: Define the canonical locale contract stored in the project. Preview locale remains draft-only.
localePolicy.listHelp: Separate locale tags with commas. Tags are normalized before they are stored.
localePolicy.enforceLabel: Block publish when required translations are missing
localePolicy.enforceHelp: Keep this disabled while translations are being prepared; missing required locales remain warnings and drafts can still be saved.

localeCoverage.title: Locale coverage
localeCoverage.description: Coverage is calculated from project translations and localized page metadata.
localeCoverage.policyInvalid: The project locale policy is invalid.
localeCoverage.noGaps: No locale coverage gaps were found.

runtimePublishGate.policyMissing: Runtime publish policy is not configured.
runtimePublishGate.blockingIssues: Runtime publish gate has blocking issues

audit.clean: No accessibility or SEO issues found for this page.

translations.title: Project translations
translations.description: Translations are stored losslessly in the canonical project and exposed to bindings under translations.<id>.
translations.empty: No project translations have been defined.
translations.valuesHelp: Use a JSON object keyed by locale, for example en, ru, or de-DE.
translations.bindHelp: Select a component on the canvas, then bind this translation to one field, attribute, or style property.
translations.localizedMetadataHelp: Provide locale maps for title, description, slug, canonical_url, open_graph_title, open_graph_description, or open_graph_image. Existing unknown metadata is preserved.

traits.empty: Select a component to edit its traits.

page_builder.facadeMissing: Page Builder admin facade is not mounted for this canvas
